name: HireVue
tagline: AI-powered video interviewing and assessment platform
description: HireVue combines video interviewing with AI-driven assessments to help companies identify top talent faster. Its science-backed assessment models evaluate candidates on job-relevant competencies through structured video interviews, game-based assessments, and coding challenges. HireVue's AI helps reduce bias and predict on-the-job performance more accurately than traditional interviews.
cons: Some candidates find video interviews impersonal
